title: brachypodium distachyon f. multiflorum
intro: Brachypodium distachyon f. multiflorum, also known as false brome, is a type of grass-like flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brachypodium distachyon f. multiflorum are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and teas, are commonly used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
